untranslatable_reason: Signal requires day-of-week filtering (Thursday entry) and multi-day directional comparison (Monday vs Tuesday/Wednesday same direction). The allowed indicator set does not include 'day_of_week' or a mechanism to compare directional consistency across multiple prior bars. The condition 'Tuesday and Wednesday moved in the same direction as Monday' requires custom bar-indexing logic unavailable in the standard indicator list. Additionally, 'reversal trade' direction is context-dependent and cannot be statically defined as LONG or SHORT without runtime evaluation of prior direction.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires (1) day-of-week awareness, (2) multi-bar directional pattern matching (comparing close[Monday] vs close[Tuesday] vs close[Wednesday]), and (3) dynamic reversal logic. The allowed indicators support single-bar analysis but not historical multi-bar direction patterns. A custom preprocessor or external rule engine would be needed to evaluate the Monday-Tuesday-Wednesday directional alignment before entry on Thursday.
